name: Jelly runner platform
description: Jelly Runner Platform is a fun and colorful platform runner where you guide a bouncy jelly through exciting levels full of obstacles, coins, and surprises. Jump, dodge, and run your way across vibrant platform while enjoying smooth controls and cheerful visuals. Easy to play, hard to master—perfect for quick fun anytime! Mobile Players: Please rotate your phone for the best gaming experience and enjoy the full colorful adventure!
instructions: Game Controls PC Press Space or Left Mouse Click to Jump Mobile Tap anywhere on the screen to Jump
